description: Heuristic rules for detecting prompt injection attempts targeting AI coding assistants

rules.name: instruction-override
rules.description: Attempts to override AI assistant's existing instructions

rules.name: role-reassignment
rules.pattern: (you are now|act as|pretend to be|assume the role of|your new role is)
rules.description: Attempts to reassign the AI assistant's identity or role

rules.name: safety-bypass
rules.description: Attempts to disable safety or content filtering mechanisms

rules.name: hidden-html-instruction
rules.description: Imperative instructions hidden inside HTML comments

rules.name: system-prompt-extraction
rules.description: Attempts to extract the AI assistant's system prompt

rules.name: do-not-follow
rules.description: Direct instruction to disobey established rules

rules.name: invisible-unicode-zwsp
rules.description: Zero-width or invisible Unicode characters that may hide content from human readers

rules.name: rtl-override
rules.description: RTL/LTR override characters that can disguise text direction and meaning

rules.name: base64-in-markdown
rules.description: Large base64-encoded block in markdown file — may contain hidden instructions

rules.name: credential-exfiltration-prompt
rules.description: Instructs AI to exfiltrate sensitive credentials or secrets

rules.name: new-instructions-delimiter
rules.description: Fake instruction delimiters attempting to inject a new system prompt section

rules.name: code-execution-instruction
rules.description: Instructions directing AI to execute arbitrary code

rules.name: output-manipulation
rules.description: Attempts to persistently modify AI output behavior

rules.name: jailbreak-keyword-cluster
rules.pattern: (DAN|do anything now|developer mode|unrestricted mode|god mode|sudo mode|admin mode)
rules.description: Known jailbreak keywords and phrases targeting AI assistants

rules.name: file-write-instruction
rules.description: Instructions to write sensitive files to the filesystem

rules.name: social-engineering-urgency
rules.description: Social engineering using urgency language combined with override instructions

rules.name: context-window-pollution
rules.description: Chat/prompt template tokens attempting to manipulate conversation structure

rules.name: disable-safety-features
rules.description: Instructions to disable safety or quality features

rules.name: obfuscated-instruction-hex
rules.description: Hex-encoded strings that may contain hidden instructions

rules.name: multi-persona-attack
rules.description: Multi-persona or mode-switching attacks on AI assistants

rules.name: delimiter-escape
rules.description: Attempts to close system prompt delimiters/tags to escape sandboxed context

rules.name: tool-parameter-injection
rules.description: Attempts to manipulate AI tool/MCP invocation parameters via injected text

rules.name: mcp-server-hijack
rules.description: MCP/skill architecture attack — attempts to redirect tool calls to attacker-controlled servers

rules.name: token-marking-bypass
rules.description: Attempts to bypass spotlighting/token-marking defenses by mimicking data delimiters

rules.name: agent-cascade-attack
rules.description: Multi-agent cascade attack — propagates malicious instructions across agent boundaries

rules.name: yaml-frontmatter-injection
rules.description: Suspicious YAML front matter containing AI instruction keywords — potential metadata injection

rules.name: privilege-escalation-prompt
rules.description: Attempts to escalate AI agent privileges beyond intended scope
